name: Screamer
description: Harmless on its own, but its shriek calls the neighbourhood down on you — a nest you must silence before it wakes the block.
signature: hollow-cheeked, jaw slack and working, chest heaving before the sound comes — the tell arrives before the scream does
notes: FR-CBT-07. When its node reaches investigating/chasing, the T25 machine deposits SCREAM_NOISE into every adjacent node so the alarm cascades.
